translated: “My father, I have come to greet you, I have brought food, drinks, and a fowl; I have also brought a calabash of palm wine; I have come to show you love and to beg you to accept me as your child.”

ref: Rachel was very jealous of Leah for having children, and she said to Jacob, “I'll die if you don't give me some children!”

translated: Rachel saw that she was not giving birth to Jacob children, so she envied her sister. She said to Jacob, “Give me children or I will die.”
